hypothesis:
## Hypothesis

Incorporating a multi-scale symmetry-aware diffusion model that progressively refines crystal structures from coarse space group classification to fine Wyckoff position optimization will achieve higher XRD-to-structure reconstruction accuracy than post-hoc gradient descent, even when the ground truth space group is unknown, by navigating the non-convex XRD loss landscape through learned symmetry-constrained manifolds rather than gradient-based optimization.
